leadName: Darris B. Richards, Attorney at Law PLLC
subject: West Branch clients searching for you online — found nothing
body:

I noticed something interesting: folks in West Branch looking for legal help often start with a quick Google search, and your practice doesn't have a website showing up for them yet. That's a real gap — your expertise deserves a place where new clients can actually find you.

I help small law firms set up clean, professional websites that make it easy for people to learn about your services and reach out without hassle. Nothing flashy, just something that builds trust fast.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute chat this week? I'd love to hear how your practice is growing and share a couple of ideas.

Warm regards,
Gourav
